message:
fix: populate error message metadata + include thinking in response detection

agent.rs:
  Error messages constructed when provider calls fail now include api,
  provider, model, and timestamp fields. Previously these were left at
  default values, making error entries in the session store lack the
  context needed to diagnose which provider/model produced the failure.

interactive.rs:
  Remove outdated comment about try_downcast and unpublished charmed-bubbletea.
  The workaround using is() + downcast().unwrap() is the intended pattern.

interactive/agent.rs:
  Include thinking content in response detection: had_response now checks
  both current_response and current_thinking. Previously, a turn that
  produced only thinking tokens (no visible response text) would be
  treated as having no response, causing the thinking content to be lost
  instead of finalized into the message history.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
